channel.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Sep 26th - Oct 2nd, 2022
item.description:
Plugins

  • tmux-session-wizardstars8 One prefix to control all your session creation, naming, switching, etc using fzfstars47.5k & zoxidestars7.9k.

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux May 23rd - May 29th, 2022
item.description:
Status Bar

  • tmux-plugin-playerctlstars8 Display MPRIS metadata in Tmux (Spotify, Clementine, VLC, etc)

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux May 2nd - May 8th, 2022
item.description:
Status Bar

  • tmux-split-statusbarstars13 Plugin for splitting status bar into 2 parts - window + left/right status

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Apr 18th - Apr 24th, 2022
item.description:
Plugins

  • tmux-menusstars102 - Popup menus to help with managing your environment.

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Mar 21st - Mar 27th, 2022
item.description:
Status Bar

  • tmux-packet-lossstars5 - Displays packet loss % if at or above the specified threshold level

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Feb 21st - Feb 27th, 2022
item.description:
Status Bar

  • tmux-window-namestars71 Names your tmux windows smartly.

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Feb 14th - Feb 20th, 2022
item.description:
Plugins

  • tmux-browserstars26 Web browser sessions attached to tmux sessions.

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Feb 7th - Feb 13th, 2022
item.description:
Status Bar

  • tmux-dfstars10 - Show available disk space (output of df command)
  • tmux-cpustars318 Show CPU load with easy icons
  • tmux-kriptostars2 Add a cryptocurrency stock price to the statusbar.
  • tmux-climastars2 Displays the current temperature and weather condition using the OpenWeather API.

    • Plugins

  • tmux-modalstars90 - Execute complex tmux commands in just a few keystrokes with a modal mode that is designed to be efficient, easy to remember and comfortable.

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Jan 31st - Feb 6th, 2022
item.description:
Plugins

  • tmux-power-zoomstars12 Zoom pane to separate window, then unzoom it back into it's original location.

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Jan 3rd - Jan 9th, 2022
item.description:
Status Bar

  • tmux-mullvadstars3 - Keep track of Mullvad VPN status.

    • Plugins

  • tmux-mouse-swipestars4 - Switch Window or Session by clicking right mouse button and swiping.

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Dec 6th - Dec 12th, 2021
item.description:
Themes

  • tmux-gruvboxstars327 Light and dark tmux theme

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Nov 22nd - Nov 28th, 2021
item.description:
Plugins

  • tmux-super-fingersstars52 like fingers, but also opens files in vim.

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Nov 15th - Nov 21st, 2021
item.description:
Status Bar

  • tmux-pomodoro-plusstars49 Incorporate the Pomodoro technique into your tmux workflow

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Oct 4th - Oct 10th, 2021
item.description:
Miscellaneous

  • sixel-tmuxstars281 a fork of tmux, with just one goal: having the most reliable support of graphics

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Sep 13th - Sep 19th, 2021
item.description:
Tools and session management

  • automuxstars3 Wrappers to tmux commands, usefull for tmux based automation

    • Plugins

  • tmux-autoreloadstars26 - Watches your tmux configuration file and automatically reloads it on change.

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Aug 9th - Aug 15th, 2021
item.description:
Tools and session management

  • tmuxakestars7 A side-pane manager for tmux
  • tmexstars47 A minimalist tmux layout manager

    • Plugins

  • muxilestars66 - View and control your tmux session from your mobile.

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Jul 26th - Aug 1st, 2021
item.description:
Plugins

  • tmux-fuzzbackstars73 Search your scrollback buffer using fzf.

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Jul 19th - Jul 25th, 2021
item.description:

  • tmux-novastars56 Fully customizable tmux theme

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux May 3rd - May 9th, 2021
item.description:
Tools and session management

  • tmux-suspendstars63 Suspend local session for painlessly working with nested remote session.

    • Status Bar

  • tmux-mode-indicatorstars39 Displays prompt indicating currently active Tmux mode.

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Apr 5th - Apr 11th, 2021
item.description:
Status Bar

  • aws-tmuxstars22 Tmux plugin that gives you access to some (potentially) useful information about AWS.

    • Plugins

  • tmux-wormholestars49 Use tmux to download files with magic wormhole

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Mar 29th - Apr 4th, 2021
item.description:
Status Bar

  • tmux-mpv-infostars1 Displays the current song playing with MPV in your tmux status bar.
  • tmux-spotify-infostars73 Spotify track info on your status bar (OSX)
  • tmux-spotify-infostars3 Spotify track info on your status bar (Linux)
  • tmux-weather-info-yrstars1 Displays the current temperature and weather based on your location via yr.no

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Mar 22nd - Mar 28th, 2021
item.description:
Plugins

  • tmux-copytkstars31 - Multi utility rapid copy toolkit.

    • Status Bar

  • tmux-world-clockstars23 Show multiple timezones using Olson tz database.

item.description:

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Jan 25th - Jan 31st, 2021

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Jan 18th - Jan 24th, 2021
item.description:
Tutorials

  • Tmux and Vim together
  • Tmux crash course
  • Using tmux for semi-interactive demos

    • Configuration

  • Guide to customizing tmux.conf
  • tmux yank to system clipboard A way to get the System Clipboard to work with tmux yank on a Mac via pbcopy and linux via xclip

    • Tools and session management

  • libtmuxstars810 Python API for tmux
  • teamocilstars2.2k A simple tool used to automatically create windows and panes in tmux with YAML files
  • tmuxpstars3.5k 💻 tmux session manager and python library

    • Books

  • tmux 2: Productive Mouse-Free Development

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Jan 4th - Jan 10th, 2021
item.description:
Plugins

  • tmux-easy-motionstars44 vim-easymotion like navigation for tmux.

item.description:

item.description:

  • tmux-notifystars61 A plugin to notify you when processes complete.

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Nov 16th - Nov 22nd, 2020

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Jun 8th - Jun 14th, 2020

  • tmux-fzf-urlstars336 For opening urls from browser quickly without mouse.

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux May 18th - May 24th, 2020
item.description:

  • tmux-colortagstars69 a plugin/theme that colors the tmux window tags.

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Apr 20th - Apr 26th, 2020
item.description:

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Apr 13th - Apr 19th, 2020
item.description:
Configuration

  • Oh My Tmux!stars2 Powerline-like theme, vim bindings, SSH aware, improved maximize pane, ...

    • Tools and session management

  • tmux-csshstars59 Tmux with a "ClusterSSH"-like behavior

    • Status Bar

  • tmux-cpu-infostars7 CPU usage gauge to status bar

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Mar 23rd - Mar 29th, 2020
item.description:
Plugins

  • tmux-thumbsstars573 A lightning fast version of tmux-fingers written in Rust, copy/pasting tmux like vimium/vimperator

item.description:

  • tmux-jumpstars195 Vimium/Easymotion like navigation for tmux.

  • tmux-weatherstars40 Show current weather using wttr.in

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Mar 4th - Mar 10th, 2019
item.description:
Plugins

  • extraktostars585 tmux clipboard copy and output completions

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Feb 11th - Feb 17th, 2019
item.description:
Status Bar

  • tmux-weatherstars33 Add weather status via forcast.io
  • tmux-batterystars392 Plug and play battery percentage and icon indicator for Tmux.
  • tmux-maildir-counterstars30 Plugin that counts files on a specific mail directory
  • tmux-mem-cpu-loadstars878 CPU, RAM memory, and load monitor for use with tmux
  • tmux-online-statusstars150 Tmux plugin that displays online status of your computer
  • tmux-prefix-highlightstars437 Plugin that highlights when you press tmux prefix key

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Dec 17th - Dec 23rd, 2018
item.description:
Themes

  • tmux-colors-solarizedstars1k A color theme for the tmux terminal multiplexer using Ethan Schoonover’s Solarized color scheme
  • tmux-themepackstars1.4k Various themes for tmux
  • tomorrowstars30: 5 flavors of Tomorrow theme based on specifications from Tomorrow Themestars13.3k (i.e. dark/blue and light).
  • tmux-base16-statuslinestars24 Statusline based on base16-shellstars25

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Sep 24th - Sep 30th, 2018
item.description:
Miscellaneous

  • tmux-tail-fstars30 A tool to tail multiple files using tmux

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Sep 10th - Sep 16th, 2018
item.description:
Plugins

  • tmux-simple-git-statusstars20 Show branch and number of changes in current git repository

    • Miscellaneous

  • sublime-tmuxstars8 Sublime Text plugin to interact with tmux sessions

    • Tools and session management

  • tmux-upstars109 Bootstrap new tmux sessions without complex tools, DSLs, or dependencies

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Sep 3rd - Sep 9th, 2018
item.description:
Tools and session management

  • tmuxpairstars37 Command line script for setting up a temporary tmux session for pair programming

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Apr 23rd - Apr 29th, 2018
item.description:
Plugins

  • tmux-1passwordstars212 Access your 1Password login items in a tmux pane.

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Jan 16th - Jan 22nd, 2017
item.description:
Plugins

  • tmux-better-mouse-modestars806 A tmux plugin to better manage and configure the mouse.

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Dec 12th - Dec 18th, 2016
item.description:
Books

  • The Tao of tmux

    • Tools and session management

  • tatstars36 Tab completion for tmux sessions

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Sep 12th - Sep 18th, 2016
item.description:
Plugins

  • tmux-fingersstars705 copy pasting in terminal with vimium/vimperator like hints.

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tmux Apr 4th - Apr 10th, 2016
item.description:
Tutorials

  • Automatically start tmux on SSH
  • Tmux primer

    • Cheat Sheets

  • tmux-cheatsheet.markdown

    • Configuration

  • Example tmux configstars1.7k 📗 Example tmux configuration - screen + vim key-bindings, system stat, cpu load bar
  • practical tmux
  • tmux-extrastars102 Configuration and scripts for sane Tmux default behavior

    • Tools and session management

  • powerlinestars13.5k Statusline plugin for vim, and provides statuslines and prompts for several other applications including tmux
  • tmuxifierstars858 Tmuxify your Tmux. Powerful session, window & pane management for Tmux.
  • tmuxinatorstars11.6k Manage complex tmux sessions easily
  • tmuxomaticstars1k Intelligent tmux session management

    • Plugins

  • tmux2htmlstars653 🐈 Render full tmux windows or individual panes as HTML
  • tmux-plugins Official tmux plugins
    • tmux-continuumstars2.5k Continuous saving of tmux environment. Automatic restore when tmux is started. Automatic tmux start when computer is turned on.
    • tmux-copycatstars961 A plugin that enhances tmux search
    • tmux-fppstars248 Quickly open any path on your terminal window in your $EDITOR of choice!
    • tmux-loggingstars870 Easy logging and screen capturing for Tmux.
    • tmux-openstars516 Tmux key bindings for quick opening of a highlighted file or url
    • tmux-pain-controlstars612 standard pane key-bindings for tmux
    • tmux-resurrectstars9.2k Persists tmux environment across system restarts.
    • tmux-sessioniststars330 Lightweight tmux utils for manipulating sessions
    • tmux-sidebarstars411 A sidebar with the directory tree for the current path. Tries to make tmux more IDE like.
    • tmux-tpmstars8.5k Tmux Plugin Manager
    • tmux-urlviewstars225 Quickly open any url on your terminal window! (No commits since 2016, see tmux-urlscan or tmux-fzf-url for a maintained alternative.)
    • tmux-yankstars2.1k Tmux plugin for copying to system clipboard. Works on OSX, Linux and Cygwin.

    • Plugins

    Development and testing

  • tmux-example-pluginstars37 Example Tmux plugin that actually demonstrates how to build plugins for Tmux
  • tmux-teststars14 A small framework for isolated testing of tmux plugins.

    • Miscellaneous

  • Statically linked tmux Install new version without root access
  • vim-tmuxstars318 vim plugin for tmux.conf
